meaning: v. 用聚光灯照 n. 聚光灯
example: A bright spotlight shone on the singer.
exampleChinese: 一盏明亮的聚光灯照在歌手身上。

meaning: v. 作为…的代表
example: She will represent our class in the speech contest.
exampleChinese: 她将代表我们班参加演讲比赛。

meaning: v. 挖（土等） n. 挖苦
example: They dig a hole to plant the tree.
exampleChinese: 他们挖了一个坑来种树。

meaning: v. 拿， 握
example: Please hold my bag for a minute.
exampleChinese: 请帮我拿一下我的包。

meaning: adv. 后来 adj. 后来的， 以后的， 后面的
example: We can talk about it later.
exampleChinese: 我们以后可以再谈这件事。

meaning: n. 警戒， 监视
example: A guard kept lookout at the gate.
exampleChinese: 一名警卫在门口警戒。

meaning: adv. 大概
example: She will possibly arrive after lunch.
exampleChinese: 她大概会在午饭后到。

meaning: v. 带， 携带
example: Please take an umbrella with you.
exampleChinese: 请随身带一把伞。

meaning: adj. 令人误解的， 导致错误结论的
example: The chart is misleading without labels.
exampleChinese: 这张图表没有标注会令人误解。

meaning: adj. 空白的， 空着的
example: Leave the last page blank.
exampleChinese: 把最后一页空着。

meaning: n. 重要
example: The teacher explained the importance of sleep.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了睡眠的重要性。

meaning: n. 习惯，风俗
example: It is our custom to eat together on holidays.
exampleChinese: 节日里一起吃饭是我们的习俗。

meaning: n. 许可
example: You need permission to enter the lab.
exampleChinese: 进入实验室需要许可。

meaning: n. 洞， 孔眼
example: There is a hole in my sock.
exampleChinese: 我的袜子上有个洞。

meaning: adj. 物质的， 实际的 n. 材料，原料
example: Wood is a common building material.
exampleChinese: 木材是常见的建筑材料。

meaning: n. 副词
example: Quickly is an adverb.
exampleChinese: quickly是一个副词。

meaning: v. 哼曲子
example: She likes to hum while cooking.
exampleChinese: 她做饭时喜欢哼曲子。

meaning: num. 第十三 n. 十三分之一
example: He finished thirteenth in the race.
exampleChinese: 他在比赛中得了第十三名。

meaning: v. 尝试， 企图
example: I will attempt the hard question first.
exampleChinese: 我会先尝试那道难题。

meaning: v. 使平衡， 使均衡 n. 天平，称
example: She tried to balance the box on her head.
exampleChinese: 她试着把盒子稳稳地顶在头上。

meaning: n. 饼干
example: He ate a chocolate cookie after dinner.
exampleChinese: 他晚饭后吃了一块巧克力饼干。

meaning: n. 地带， 地区
example: This town lies in a rice belt.
exampleChinese: 这个小镇位于水稻种植带。

meaning: v. 切，劈，砍 n. 〔羊、猪等〕排骨
example: Please chop the carrots into small pieces.
exampleChinese: 请把胡萝卜切成小块。

meaning: adj. 奶油色的 n. 奶油
example: She spread cream on the cake.
exampleChinese: 她把奶油抹在蛋糕上。

meaning: n. 棒球
example: My brother plays baseball after school.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥放学后打棒球。

meaning: adj. 心烦的， 苦恼的 n. 困扰，麻烦
example: She felt upset after losing her keys.
exampleChinese: 丢了钥匙后，她感到很苦恼。

meaning: n. 贼， 小偷
example: The thief ran away with her bag.
exampleChinese: 小偷带着她的包跑了。

meaning: adj. 尴尬的， 为难的
example: I felt embarrassed when I said the wrong name.
exampleChinese: 当我叫错名字时，我感到很尴尬。

meaning: adj. 使人不愉快的， 厌恶的
example: The smell from the trash was unpleasant.
exampleChinese: 垃圾散发出的气味令人不愉快。

meaning: n. 皮
example: Cold wind can dry out your skin.
exampleChinese: 冷风会使你的皮肤变干。

meaning: n. 夏天
example: We often go swimming in summer.
exampleChinese: 我们夏天经常去游泳。

meaning: v. 在烤架上烧烤 n. 烧烤野餐
example: My family will barbecue fish in the yard tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我家人会在院子里烤鱼。

meaning: n. 成年男子 v. 在〔某系统、设备等上〕工作
example: A tall man opened the door for us.
exampleChinese: 一位高个子男子为我们开了门。

meaning: v. 站， 站立
example: Please stand near the window.
exampleChinese: 请站在窗户旁边。

meaning: n. 香烟
example: He threw the cigarette into the bin.
exampleChinese: 他把香烟扔进了垃圾桶。

meaning: adj. 积极的， 正面的
example: She has a positive attitude toward life.
exampleChinese: 她对生活有积极的态度。

meaning: n. 例子， 实例， 事例
example: This sentence is a good instance of polite language.
exampleChinese: 这个句子是礼貌用语的一个好例子。

meaning: n. 歌剧
example: We watched an opera at the city theater.
exampleChinese: 我们在市剧院看了一场歌剧。

meaning: v. 感受到 n. 感觉
example: I can feel the sun on my face.
exampleChinese: 我能感觉到阳光照在脸上。

meaning: n. 兴奋， 激动
example: She felt a thrill when the concert began.
exampleChinese: 音乐会开始时，她感到一阵兴奋。

meaning: v. 为…服务
example: These buses serve the whole town.
exampleChinese: 这些公交车为整个城镇服务。

meaning: n. 解决， 解答， 解决办法
example: We need a simple solution to this problem.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一个解决这个问题的简单办法。

meaning: v. 发现 n. 〔尤指通过挖掘或水下打捞找到的〕发现物
example: I was happy to find my lost watch.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴找到了我丢失的手表。

meaning: n. 主人
example: The host welcomed us at the door.
exampleChinese: 主人在门口欢迎了我们。

meaning: v. 联合 n. 联合企业
example: We can combine sugar and water in this cup.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把糖和水混合在这个杯子里。

meaning: n. 海龟
example: A turtle swam near the beach.
exampleChinese: 一只海龟在海滩附近游泳。

meaning: n. 喜剧
example: This comedy made the whole class laugh.
exampleChinese: 这部喜剧把全班都逗笑了。

meaning: n. 装备
example: The campers checked their equipment before the hike.
exampleChinese: 徒步前，露营者检查了他们的装备。

meaning: v. 对…施加压力 n. 压
example: Too much pressure can make people tired.
exampleChinese: 太大的压力会让人疲惫。

meaning: n. 垃圾， 废物
example: Please throw the trash in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾桶里。

meaning: v. 喂， 为…提供食物
example: I feed the fish every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喂鱼。

meaning: v. 忘记
example: Do not forget your homework at home.
exampleChinese: 不要把你的家庭作业忘在家里。

meaning: adj. 方便的
example: It is convenient to pay by phone here.
exampleChinese: 在这里用手机付款很方便。

meaning: n. 梯级
example: He stopped on the last stair.
exampleChinese: 他停在最后一级台阶上。

meaning: v. 属于
example: This blue bag does not belong to me.
exampleChinese: 这个蓝色的包不属于我。

meaning: adv. 最好， 最 adj. 最好的
example: She sings best when she feels relaxed.
exampleChinese: 她放松时唱得最好。

meaning: n. 凌乱的状态， 脏乱的状态
example: Your desk is in a mess again.
exampleChinese: 你的书桌又乱成一团了。

meaning: adj. 出生地的 n. 土生土长者
example: She is a native speaker of English.
exampleChinese: 她以英语为母语。

meaning: v. 做， 制造
example: We make bread at home on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 我们星期天在家做面包。

meaning: n. 微波
example: The soup is heating in the microwave.
exampleChinese: 汤正在微波炉里加热。

meaning: v. 构造 n. 结构，构造
example: The bridge has a strong structure.
exampleChinese: 这座桥有坚固的结构。

meaning: adv. 在户外 adj. 户外的
example: The kids played outdoor games after lunch.
exampleChinese: 孩子们午饭后玩了户外游戏。

meaning: adj. 在线的
example: Our online class starts at eight.
exampleChinese: 我们的在线课程八点开始。

meaning: n. 作者
example: My sister wants to be a writer one day.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹希望有一天成为一名作者。

meaning: v. 围住，　隔开 n. 栅栏
example: They built a fence around the garden.
exampleChinese: 他们在花园周围建了一圈栅栏。

meaning: n. 戏院， 剧场
example: We saw a play at the theatre last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚我们在剧场看了一场戏。

meaning: adj. 坚实的， 结实的 n. 公司
example: He works for a small law firm downtown.
exampleChinese: 他在市中心一家小律师事务所工作。

meaning: n. 性格
example: Her kind character makes everyone trust her.
exampleChinese: 她善良的性格让大家都信任她。

meaning: adj. 巴西的 n. 巴西人
example: Our new coach is Brazilian.
exampleChinese: 我们的新教练是巴西人。

meaning: v. 粘，贴 n. 柴枝
example: Please stick the photo on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把这张照片贴在墙上。

meaning: n. 乐队
example: The school band played at the festival.
exampleChinese: 学校乐队在节日活动上演奏了。

meaning: n. 购物中心
example: There is a new bookshop in the mall.
exampleChinese: 购物中心里有一家新的书店。

meaning: adj. 优良的 n. 质，质量
example: The quality of this bag is very good.
exampleChinese: 这个包的质量很好。

meaning: n. 劳动
example: Farm work takes a lot of labor.
exampleChinese: 农活需要大量劳动。

meaning: adj. 粗鲁的， 无礼的
example: It was rude to laugh at his mistake.
exampleChinese: 嘲笑他的错误是很无礼的。

meaning: n. 协会， 联盟， 社团
example: She joined the student association last term.
exampleChinese: 她上学期加入了学生协会。

meaning: adj. 漂亮的， 娇小可爱的
example: That puppy looks so cute in the basket.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗待在篮子里看起来真可爱。

meaning: v. 使混合，配制 n. 混合
example: Mix the flour with water in a bowl.
exampleChinese: 把面粉和水在碗里混合。

meaning: v. 打扰，麻烦 n. 麻烦， 焦急
example: Sorry to bother you during dinner.
exampleChinese: 对不起，在你吃晚饭时打扰你了。

meaning: n. 星
example: The first star appeared in the sky.
exampleChinese: 天空中出现了第一颗星星。

meaning: n. 狼
example: The wolf disappeared into the dark forest.
exampleChinese: 那只狼消失在黑暗的森林里。

meaning: pron. 许多人 adj. 许多的
example: Many of my classmates ride bikes to school.
exampleChinese: 我的许多同学骑自行车上学。

meaning: n. 运输， 运输系统
example: Public transportation is convenient in this city.
exampleChinese: 这个城市的公共交通很方便。

meaning: n. 代理人
example: The agent signed the papers for the seller.
exampleChinese: 代理人为卖方签了文件。

meaning: v. 对待，处理 n. 款待
example: Please treat your classmates with respect.
exampleChinese: 请尊重地对待你的同学。

meaning: v. 投射， 发射
example: This lamp can project a bright circle on the wall.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯能把一个明亮的圆投射到墙上。

meaning: n. 手提箱
example: Her suitcase was too heavy to carry upstairs.
exampleChinese: 她的手提箱太重了，搬不上楼。

meaning: n. 胡须
example: My uncle has a long gray beard.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔留着长长的灰胡须。

meaning: v. 渴望 n. 饿，饥饿
example: After the long hike, we all felt hunger.
exampleChinese: 长途步行后，我们都感到饥饿。

meaning: n. 实验室
example: The students are doing an experiment in the laboratory.
exampleChinese: 学生们正在实验室里做实验。

meaning: n. 俄国
example: My history teacher once traveled to Russia.
exampleChinese: 我的历史老师曾去过俄国。

meaning: adj. 孪生的 n. 孪生儿之一
example: Jane and her twin look very alike.
exampleChinese: 简和她的孪生姐妹看起来非常像。

meaning: v. 评论 n. 评论，意见
example: He refused to comment on the news.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝评论这则新闻。

meaning: n. 电梯
example: We took the elevator to the tenth floor.
exampleChinese: 我们乘电梯到了十楼。

meaning: adj. 失去的， 丧失的
example: I felt lost on my first day at the new school.
exampleChinese: 在新学校的第一天，我感到很迷茫。

meaning: n. 计算器
example: You may use a calculator in this math test.
exampleChinese: 这次数学考试你可以使用计算器。

meaning: n. 生物学
example: Biology is her favorite subject this term.
exampleChinese: 生物学是她这学期最喜欢的科目。

meaning: v. 失去， 损失
example: Be careful not to lose your keys.
exampleChinese: 小心别把钥匙弄丢了。

meaning: prep. 向， 朝， 面对
example: The dog ran toward the open gate.
exampleChinese: 那只狗朝着打开的大门跑去。

meaning: adj. 特别喜爱的 n. 特别喜欢的人或事物
example: This blue sweater is my favorite.
exampleChinese: 这件蓝色毛衣是我的最爱。

meaning: adj. 相同的 n. 制服
example: Every student wears a school uniform on Monday.
exampleChinese: 每个学生周一都穿校服。

meaning: v. 落下， 降落
example: Leaves fall from the trees in autumn.
exampleChinese: 秋天树叶从树上落下。

meaning: adv. 在屋内
example: Because of the rain, we stayed indoors all afternoon.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，我们整个下午都待在屋内。

meaning: v. 吃， 吃饭
example: We eat dinner at six every evening.
exampleChinese: 我们每天晚上六点吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 意见
example: In my opinion, this book is very helpful.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这本书很有帮助。

meaning: n. 逗号
example: Please put a comma after this word.
exampleChinese: 请在这个单词后面加一个逗号。

meaning: v. 更喜欢
example: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早上我更喜欢喝茶，不喜欢喝咖啡。

meaning: n. 戏院， 剧场
example: We watched a play at the theater last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚我们在剧场看了一场戏。

meaning: prep. 从…来， 出自
example: This letter is from my cousin in Beijing.
exampleChinese: 这封信来自我在北京的表弟。

meaning: n. 咒语， 符咒
example: In the story, the witch used a spell to open the door.
exampleChinese: 在故事里，女巫用了一个咒语打开门。

meaning: adv. 十分 pron. 许多
example: Thank you very much for your help.
exampleChinese: 非常感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 鼠
example: A small mouse ran under the table.
exampleChinese: 一只小老鼠跑到了桌子下面。

meaning: v. 偷盗， 行窃
example: It is wrong to steal from others.
exampleChinese: 偷别人的东西是不对的。

meaning: adj. 科学的
example: The report is based on scientific research.
exampleChinese: 这份报告以科学研究为基础。

meaning: n. 恐怖主义者
example: The police arrested the terrorist at the station.
exampleChinese: 警方在车站逮捕了那名恐怖主义者。

meaning: adj. 伴随的 n. 服务人员，侍者
example: The flight attendant brought us water.
exampleChinese: 乘务员给我们送来了水。

meaning: v. 花费， 用
example: I spend two hours on homework every night.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上花两个小时做作业。

meaning: adj. X射线的
example: The doctor ordered an x-ray exam for my arm.
exampleChinese: 医生让我给胳膊做一次X射线检查。

meaning: n. 优点
example: One advantage of walking is that it is free.
exampleChinese: 步行的一个优点是它不花钱。

meaning: adj. 助理的 n. 助手
example: My assistant helped me organize the files.
exampleChinese: 我的助手帮我整理了文件。

meaning: n. 甜食
example: We had ice cream for dessert.
exampleChinese: 我们甜点吃了冰淇淋。

meaning: n. 胡萝卜
example: She put a carrot into the soup.
exampleChinese: 她把一根胡萝卜放进了汤里。

meaning: v. 骑自行车 n. 自行车
example: He rides his bicycle to school every day.
exampleChinese: 他每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. 袋鼠
example: We saw a kangaroo at the zoo yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们昨天在动物园看到了一只袋鼠。

meaning: adj. 极坏的
example: The food at that restaurant was awful.
exampleChinese: 那家餐馆的食物极坏。

meaning: adv. 是
example: Yeah, I finished my homework already.
exampleChinese: 是的，我已经做完作业了。

meaning: n. 正式决定， 决议
example: The class passed a resolution to clean the park.
exampleChinese: 全班通过了一项清理公园的决议。

meaning: n. 七月
example: My summer course starts in July.
exampleChinese: 我的暑期课程七月开始。

meaning: v. 教育
example: Good teachers educate students with patience.
exampleChinese: 好老师耐心地教育学生。

meaning: n. 照明
example: The lighting in the library is bright and clear.
exampleChinese: 图书馆的照明明亮清晰。

meaning: n. 考试
example: I have a math exam tomorrow morning.
exampleChinese: 我明天早上有一场数学考试。

meaning: n. 招贴
example: There is a concert poster on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一张音乐会招贴。

meaning: n. 咽喉
example: My throat hurts when I speak loudly.
exampleChinese: 我大声说话时咽喉会疼。

meaning: n. 交响乐， 交响曲
example: We listened to a symphony in music class.
exampleChinese: 我们在音乐课上听了一首交响曲。

meaning: v. 睡
example: Babies sleep for many hours each day.
exampleChinese: 婴儿每天要睡很多个小时。

meaning: n. 法国人
example: The French are famous for their cuisine.
exampleChinese: 法国人以他们的美食而闻名。

meaning: n. 词汇
example: Reading daily can improve your vocabulary.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读能提高你的词汇量。

meaning: v. 退休， 退役
example: My grandfather plans to retire next year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷打算明年退休。

meaning: adj. 侵犯的， 侵略的， 挑衅的
example: The dog became aggressive when strangers came close.
exampleChinese: 陌生人靠近时，那只狗变得很有攻击性。

meaning: v. 扫， 打扫， 拂
example: Please sweep the floor after class.
exampleChinese: 请在下课后扫地。

meaning: adj. 不友好的
example: The shop assistant seemed unfriendly to customers.
exampleChinese: 那位店员对顾客似乎不太友好。

meaning: num. 第十四 n. 十四分之一
example: Her birthday is on the fourteenth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月十四日。

meaning: n. 照片
example: I put your photo on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我把你的照片放在我的桌子上。

meaning: num. 第三十 n. 三十分之一
example: Her birthday is on the thirtieth of June.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在六月三十日。

meaning: adj. 乡村的
example: My grandparents live in a rural village.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母住在一个乡村。

meaning: v. 离开， 出发
example: We should leave home early for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们应该早点离家去赶火车。

meaning: num. 第十七 n. 十七分之一
example: The art room is on the seventeenth floor.
exampleChinese: 美术教室在第十七层。

meaning: n. 架子
example: Put the storybooks back on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 把故事书放回书架上。

meaning: v. 剥…的壳 n. 壳，贝壳
example: The child picked up a shell on the beach.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子在海滩上捡起了一个贝壳。

meaning: adv. 因此
example: It was raining hard; therefore, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 雨下得很大，因此我们待在室内。

meaning: v. 调换， n. 交换，互换
example: We exchange gifts at the New Year party.
exampleChinese: 我们在新年聚会上交换礼物。

meaning: adj. 无聊的， 无趣的
example: I felt bored during the long bus ride.
exampleChinese: 在漫长的公交车程中我感到很无聊。

meaning: v. 选择
example: You can choose a book from this box.
exampleChinese: 你可以从这个箱子里选一本书。

meaning: v. 骑
example: I ride my bike to the park on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我周末骑自行车去公园。

meaning: v. 表现
example: Please behave well in the library.
exampleChinese: 请在图书馆里表现得规矩一些。

meaning: n. 奖牌
example: She won a gold medal in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在赛跑中赢得了一枚金牌。

meaning: n. 〔行为、看法、言辞等上的〕错误 v. 弄错
example: I made a mistake in the last question.
exampleChinese: 我在最后一道题上犯了一个错误。

meaning: v. 灌， 倒
example: Please pour some milk into the cup.
exampleChinese: 请往杯子里倒一些牛奶。

meaning: n. 爆米花
example: We shared a bag of popcorn at the movie.
exampleChinese: 我们看电影时分着吃了一袋爆米花。

meaning: n. 地点， 处所
example: This spot under the tree is nice for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 树下这个地方很适合野餐。

meaning: v. 镀银 n. 银
example: The ring is made of silver.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指是银制的。

meaning: v. 帮助 n. 帮助，救助
example: The nurse came quickly to aid the old man.
exampleChinese: 护士很快赶来帮助那位老人。

meaning: n. 歌手
example: My sister wants to be a singer one day.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹希望有一天成为一名歌手。

meaning: v. 瞄准， 对准 n. 目的，目标
example: Aim at the basket before you throw the ball.
exampleChinese: 投球前先瞄准篮筐。

meaning: adj. 确信的， 肯定的
example: She felt confident before the speech.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲前感到很自信。

meaning: adj. 地方性的，本地的 n. 当地人
example: We bought fresh fruit from the local market.
exampleChinese: 我们从当地市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: v. 说话， 讲话
example: Please speak slowly so everyone can understand.
exampleChinese: 请说慢一点，这样每个人都能听懂。

meaning: n. 洗手间
example: Excuse me, where is the restroom?
exampleChinese: 请问，洗手间在哪里？

meaning: adj. 地极的， 近地极的
example: Polar bears live in very cold places.
exampleChinese: 北极熊生活在非常寒冷的地方。

meaning: n. 鲨鱼
example: We saw a shark in the sea show.
exampleChinese: 我们在海洋表演中看见了一条鲨鱼。

meaning: adv. 更，更多 adj. 更多的
example: I need more time to finish the model.
exampleChinese: 我需要更多时间完成这个模型。

meaning: v. 摇动， 摇
example: Shake the bottle before you drink the juice.
exampleChinese: 喝果汁前先摇一摇瓶子。

meaning: v. 尊敬 n. 尊敬，敬意
example: We honor our teachers on Teachers' Day.
exampleChinese: 我们在教师节向老师表达敬意。

meaning: n. 笼子
example: The bird flew out of the cage.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟从笼子里飞了出来。

meaning: adj. 不健康的
example: Too much fast food is unhealthy for children.
exampleChinese: 过多的快餐对孩子不健康。

meaning: n. 昆虫， 虫
example: This insect has bright green wings.
exampleChinese: 这只昆虫有鲜绿色的翅膀。

meaning: adj. 净的 n. 网
example: The fisherman pulled in the net slowly.
exampleChinese: 渔夫慢慢收起了网。

meaning: v. 给…加上边， 围 n. 边，边缘
example: The farm is close to the border.
exampleChinese: 那个农场靠近边界。

meaning: v. 读， 阅读
example: I like to read before going to bed.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在睡觉前阅读。

meaning: modal verb. 〔某事〕必定
example: Shall we meet at the school gate at eight?
exampleChinese: 我们八点在校门口见好吗？

meaning: adv. 在附近 adj. 附近的
example: There is a nearby shop that sells snacks.
exampleChinese: 附近有一家卖零食的商店。

meaning: n. 代词
example: In this sentence, "she" is a pronoun.
exampleChinese: 在这个句子里，she 是一个代词。

meaning: adj. 有才能的， 有才干的
example: She is a talented young pianist.
exampleChinese: 她是一位有才华的年轻钢琴家。

meaning: v. 预言
example: No one can predict the future exactly.
exampleChinese: 没有人能准确预言未来。

meaning: n. 话， 言语
example: My grandfather often repeats a saying about hard work.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷常常重复一句关于努力工作的言语。

meaning: n. 法国
example: My aunt wants to visit France next summer.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈明年夏天想去法国。

meaning: adj. 特定的，特有的
example: The teacher asked for a specific example.
exampleChinese: 老师要求举一个特定的例子。

meaning: adj. 极好的， 上等的
example: You did a super job on the poster.
exampleChinese: 你的海报做得极好。

meaning: n. 家庭杂务
example: Washing the dishes is my evening chore.
exampleChinese: 洗碗是我晚上要做的家庭杂务。

meaning: n. 学期
example: This semester is much busier than the last one.
exampleChinese: 这个学期比上一个学期忙得多。

meaning: n. 谋略
example: Our strategy helped us win the game.
exampleChinese: 我们的策略帮助我们赢得了比赛。

meaning: adj. 乏味的， 单调的
example: The movie was dull, so I almost fell asleep.
exampleChinese: 这部电影很乏味，所以我差点睡着了。

meaning: v. 推断， 分析 n. 原因，理由
example: The main reason for the delay was heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 延误的主要原因是大雨。

meaning: n. 戒指
example: She wears a silver ring on her left hand.
exampleChinese: 她左手戴着一枚银戒指。

meaning: n. 传说
example: The old legend tells of a dragon in the lake.
exampleChinese: 那个古老的传说讲的是湖里有一条龙。

meaning: adj. 职业的 n. 专业人员
example: You should ask a professional for legal advice.
exampleChinese: 你应该向专业人员寻求法律建议。

meaning: num. 第十九 n. 十九分之一
example: Today is my nineteenth birthday.
exampleChinese: 今天是我的第十九个生日。

meaning: n. 邻居
example: Our neighbor brought us some fresh oranges.
exampleChinese: 我们的邻居给我们送来了一些新鲜橙子。

meaning: adj. 温柔的， 慈祥的
example: Her gentle voice made the baby calm down.
exampleChinese: 她温柔的声音让宝宝平静下来。

meaning: v. 沸腾
example: Wait for the water to boil before adding the noodles.
exampleChinese: 等水沸腾后再下面条。

meaning: n. 信封
example: I put the letter in an envelope.
exampleChinese: 我把信放进了一个信封里。

meaning: n. 火鸡
example: We ate roast turkey for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了烤火鸡。

meaning: adj. 美味的 n. 好吃的东西
example: These noodles are really tasty.
exampleChinese: 这些面条真的很美味。

meaning: n. 直升机
example: A helicopter flew over the river this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上，一架直升机飞过了河面。

meaning: v. 存在， 是
example: There are two apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有两个苹果。

meaning: adj. 有残疾的
example: The school has ramps for disabled students.
exampleChinese: 学校为有残疾的学生设有坡道。

meaning: n. 妈妈
example: My mom makes noodles for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭做面条。

meaning: v. 旅行
example: We plan to tour the old city by bus.
exampleChinese: 我们计划乘公交车游览这座古城。

meaning: adj. 镇静的，镇定的 v. 平静
example: She stayed calm during the test.
exampleChinese: 考试时她保持镇定。

meaning: adj. 爵士乐的 n. 爵士乐
example: My uncle listens to jazz on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔周末听爵士乐。

meaning: v. 跑， 奔跑
example: I run around the park every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上绕着公园跑步。

meaning: v. 考虑， 认为 n. 看法，观点
example: In my view, this plan is simple and useful.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这个计划简单又实用。

meaning: n. 家具
example: We bought new furniture for the living room.
exampleChinese: 我们给客厅买了新家具。

meaning: v. 捐赠
example: Many people donate books to the village library.
exampleChinese: 许多人向乡村图书馆捐赠书籍。

meaning: modal verb. 可以〔用于礼貌地提出建议〕 n. 力量
example: You might try asking the teacher for help.
exampleChinese: 你可以试着向老师求助。

meaning: adj. 更坏的 n. 更差的事物 adv. 更严重地
example: The weather got worse after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后天气变得更糟了。

meaning: v. 自愿 n. 志愿者
example: I volunteer at the animal shelter on Saturdays.
exampleChinese: 我每周六在动物收容所做志愿者。

meaning: adj. 最坏
example: That was the worst storm of the year.
exampleChinese: 那是今年最糟糕的一场暴风雨。

meaning: n. 服装
example: Winter clothing is on sale this week.
exampleChinese: 冬季服装本周正在打折。

meaning: n. 弦， 线， 细绳
example: She tied the bag with a piece of string.
exampleChinese: 她用一根细绳把袋子系上了。

meaning: n. 距离， 间距
example: The distance from my home to school is three kilometers.
exampleChinese: 从我家到学校的距离是三公里。

meaning: n. 颜色 vt. 给…着色
example: Blue is my favorite color.
exampleChinese: 蓝色是我最喜欢的颜色。

meaning: n. 火星
example: Scientists hope to send more robots to Mars.
exampleChinese: 科学家希望向火星发送更多机器人。

meaning: n. 陈述， 声明
example: The company released a short statement this morning.
exampleChinese: 公司今天早上发布了一份简短的声明。

meaning: v. 升起， 上升
example: The sun will rise at about six tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天太阳大约六点升起。

meaning: n. 便士， 分
example: This candy costs only one penny.
exampleChinese: 这块糖只要一便士。

meaning: v. 租借，租用 n. 租金
example: My family will rent a small apartment near the school.
exampleChinese: 我家要在学校附近租一套小公寓。

meaning: adj. 焦虑的， 发愁的， 令人焦急的
example: She felt anxious before the final exam.
exampleChinese: 期末考试前她感到很焦虑。

meaning: v. 切成片，削 n. 薄片， 切片
example: Please slice the bread for lunch.
exampleChinese: 请把面包切成片做午餐。

meaning: adv. 远 adj. 远的，　远方的
example: My grandparents live far from the city center.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母住得离市中心很远。

meaning: v. 抓住， 接住
example: Can you catch the ball for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我接住这个球吗？

meaning: v. 传真
example: Please fax the form to our office today.
exampleChinese: 请今天把这份表格传真到我们办公室。

meaning: n. 事例， 实例
example: This case shows why practice is important.
exampleChinese: 这个事例说明了练习为什么重要。

meaning: v. 给予， 赠送
example: I want to give my teacher a thank-you card.
exampleChinese: 我想送给老师一张感谢卡。

meaning: v. 打电话 n. 电话
example: I will phone my mother after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后我会给妈妈打电话。

meaning: v. （使）滑行 n. 滑梯
example: The kids love to slide down the playground slide.
exampleChinese: 孩子们喜欢从操场上的滑梯滑下来。

meaning: n. 风格， 文体
example: Her writing style is simple and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的写作风格简单而清晰。

meaning: n. 丛林
example: We heard birds in the dense jungle.
exampleChinese: 我们在茂密的丛林里听到了鸟叫声。

meaning: n. 一套衣服
example: He wore a dark blue suit to the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他穿着一套深蓝色西装去参加会议。

meaning: n. 阴
example: In Chinese thought, Yin and Yang balance each other.
exampleChinese: 在中国思想中，阴和阳彼此平衡。

meaning: v. 强调， 着重 n. 压力，紧张
example: Good teachers stress the value of honest work.
exampleChinese: 好老师强调诚实劳动的价值。

meaning: v. 陈列， 展览
example: The museum will display old photos next week.
exampleChinese: 博物馆下周将展览旧照片。

meaning: n. 粥， 麦片粥
example: Grandma made warm porridge for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 奶奶做了热粥当早餐。

meaning: v. 批评
example: It is easy to criticize others from the outside.
exampleChinese: 站在局外批评别人很容易。

meaning: v. 关闭， 关上
example: Please shut the door before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把门关上。

meaning: v. 签名 n. 亲笔签名
example: The singer agreed to autograph my notebook.
exampleChinese: 那位歌手同意在我的笔记本上签名。

meaning: num. 第十一
example: She finished eleventh in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中获得第十一名。

meaning: n. 天资， 才能
example: Music is her greatest talent.
exampleChinese: 音乐是她最大的天资。

meaning: adj. 热心的
example: He is keen to help with the school show.
exampleChinese: 他很热心帮忙筹备学校演出。

meaning: v. 用语言表达 n. 短语
example: This phrase appears in many English books.
exampleChinese: 这个短语出现在很多英语书里。

meaning: v. 使保持， 使继续
example: Keep the window open for fresh air.
exampleChinese: 让窗户保持开着，好让空气流通。

meaning: n. 酸奶
example: She ate yoghurt with fruit for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 她早餐吃了加水果的酸奶。

meaning: adj. 基本的， 基础的
example: We are learning elementary math this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期我们在学习基础数学。

meaning: n. 题目， 话题
example: Our teacher gave us a new topic to discuss.
exampleChinese: 老师给了我们一个新的话题来讨论。

meaning: v. 不许， 禁止
example: My parents forbid me to stay out late.
exampleChinese: 我父母不许我在外面待到很晚。

meaning: v. 进特种饮食 n. 日常饮食
example: A healthy diet includes fresh vegetables.
exampleChinese: 健康的日常饮食包括新鲜蔬菜。

meaning: v. 〔在竞赛、游戏、选举等中〕获胜，赢 n. 〔尤指在体育比赛中的〕胜利，赢
example: Our team hopes to win the final game.
exampleChinese: 我们队希望赢得最后一场比赛。

meaning: n. 羊，绵羊
example: The farmer keeps sheep on the hill.
exampleChinese: 那位农夫在山坡上养羊。

meaning: n. 足球
example: We play soccer after school on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 我们星期五放学后踢足球。

meaning: v. 合计 n. 总额
example: The total amount was higher than we expected.
exampleChinese: 总额比我们预想的更高。

meaning: adj. 最初的，原始的 n. 原件
example: This is the original painting, not a copy.
exampleChinese: 这是原作，不是复制品。

meaning: n. 粘贴簿
example: She keeps old stamps in an album.
exampleChinese: 她把旧邮票收藏在一本粘贴簿里。

meaning: v. 说 n. 决定权
example: Please say your name clearly.
exampleChinese: 请清楚地说出你的名字。

meaning: v. 照耀 n. 光泽， 光
example: The sun began to shine through the clouds.
exampleChinese: 太阳开始穿过云层照耀。

meaning: v. 展开，伸开 n. 传播， 蔓延
example: Please spread the map on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把地图展开在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 光亮的， 有光泽的
example: She wore shiny black shoes to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一双有光泽的黑鞋去上学。

meaning: n. 头痛
example: I have a headache after reading too long.
exampleChinese: 看书太久后我头痛。

meaning: adj. 坏的
example: The milk smells bad.
exampleChinese: 这牛奶闻起来坏了。

meaning: v. 带来， 拿来
example: Please bring your notebook to class tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 请明天把你的笔记本带到课堂上。

meaning: n. 沙司
example: This pasta tastes better with tomato sauce.
exampleChinese: 这意大利面配番茄沙司更好吃。

meaning: adj. 醒着的 v. 醒， 唤醒
example: I was still awake at midnight.
exampleChinese: 我在半夜时还醒着。

meaning: v. 排列， 使排成行 n. 等级
example: The teacher asked us to rank the books by size.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们按大小排列这些书。

meaning: v. 冲浪 n. 拍岸浪花
example: They surf every summer at the beach.
exampleChinese: 他们每年夏天都在海边冲浪。

meaning: v. 是
example: I am ready for the test.
exampleChinese: 我准备好考试了。

meaning: v. 折叠 n. 褶痕
example: Please fold the paper in half.
exampleChinese: 请把这张纸对折。

meaning: adj. 神秘的
example: There was a mysterious light in the forest.
exampleChinese: 森林里有一道神秘的光。

meaning: v. 驱赶 n. 驱车出行
example: My uncle will drive us to the station.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔会开车送我们去车站。

meaning: v. 弄伤 adj. 痛的 n. 〔对感情造成的〕伤害
example: Be careful not to hurt your knee.
exampleChinese: 小心别弄伤你的膝盖。

meaning: n. 祖国
example: He hopes to return to his homeland one day.
exampleChinese: 他希望有一天回到祖国。

meaning: n. 数学
example: Maths is my favorite subject this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期数学是我最喜欢的科目。

meaning: v. 看， 观看
example: I can see the mountains from my window.
exampleChinese: 我从窗户能看见群山。

meaning: v. 欺骗，愚弄 adj. 愚蠢的 n. 蠢人
example: You cannot fool me with that simple trick.
exampleChinese: 你不能用那个简单的把戏骗我。

meaning: n. 普及
example: The popularity of online learning has grown fast.
exampleChinese: 在线学习的普及发展得很快。

meaning: n. 牙，牙齿
example: My tooth hurts when I eat ice cream.
exampleChinese: 我吃冰淇淋时牙齿会疼。

meaning: n. 脚，足
example: My foot got wet in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的脚在雨里淋湿了。

meaning: v. 〔小心地〕放置 n. 〔物品的〕一套 adj. 在…位置的
example: She set the cup on the table carefully.
exampleChinese: 她小心地把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 杰出的
example: She did an outstanding job on the science project.
exampleChinese: 她在科学项目中做得非常出色。

meaning: n. 〈美〉自动扶梯
example: We took the escalator to the second floor.
exampleChinese: 我们乘自动扶梯到了二楼。

meaning: v. 做…的搭档 n. 配偶，搭档
example: I will partner with Mia for the class game.
exampleChinese: 我要和米娅搭档参加班级游戏。

meaning: n. 蜘蛛
example: A small spider is on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一只小蜘蛛。

meaning: n. 美， 美丽
example: The beauty of the lake amazed us.
exampleChinese: 湖泊的美让我们惊叹。

meaning: v. 做， 从事
example: I do my homework after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我晚饭后做作业。

meaning: adj. 幽默的
example: Our teacher is humorous and kind.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师既幽默又亲切。

meaning: adj. 恐怖的
example: That movie was too scary for me.
exampleChinese: 那部电影对我来说太恐怖了。

meaning: n. 缺点
example: One disadvantage of the trip is the long bus ride.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的一个缺点是要坐很长时间的公交车。

meaning: v. 抱怨， 诉苦
example: Don't complain about the weather all day.
exampleChinese: 不要整天抱怨天气。

meaning: n. 刀， 餐刀
example: He cut the apple with a knife.
exampleChinese: 他用刀切苹果。

meaning: n. 电冰箱
example: The milk is in the refrigerator.
exampleChinese: 牛奶在电冰箱里。

meaning: adj. 小的， 矮小的
example: The little dog ran to its owner.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗跑向它的主人。

meaning: n. 橡树
example: The old oak stands by the river.
exampleChinese: 那棵老橡树立在河边。

meaning: v. 坐， 就座
example: Please sit by the window.
exampleChinese: 请坐在窗边。

meaning: v. 聚集， 群集 n. 人群，群众
example: A crowd waited outside the stadium.
exampleChinese: 一群人在体育场外等着。

meaning: adv. 容易地
example: She can easily solve this math problem.
exampleChinese: 她能轻松解出这道数学题。

meaning: n. 戏装
example: The actor changed into a bright costume before the show.
exampleChinese: 演出前，演员换上了鲜艳的戏装。

meaning: n. 走廊， 回廊
example: Our classroom is at the end of the hallway.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室在走廊的尽头。

meaning: n. 动词
example: Run is a common verb in English.
exampleChinese: run 是英语中常见的动词。

meaning: v. 存在， 是
example: This book is on my desk.
exampleChinese: 这本书在我的书桌上。

meaning: v. 油煎
example: My mother will fry the fish for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭会煎鱼。

meaning: v. 喝，饮 n. 一杯饮料
example: I usually drink milk in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我通常早上喝牛奶。

meaning: v. 宣布， 声称
example: The teacher will announce the test results tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会宣布考试成绩。

meaning: v. 动手术
example: The doctors had to operate at once.
exampleChinese: 医生们不得不立刻动手术。

meaning: int. 喂， 你好
example: I said hello to my new neighbor.
exampleChinese: 我向我的新邻居打了声你好。

meaning: v. 开始
example: The class will begin at eight o'clock.
exampleChinese: 八点钟开始上课。

meaning: n. 鹦鹉
example: The green parrot can say a few words.
exampleChinese: 这只绿色的鹦鹉会说几句话。

meaning: v. 变成， 成为
example: She wants to become a doctor someday.
exampleChinese: 她想有一天成为一名医生。

meaning: v. 打破
example: Be careful not to break the glass.
exampleChinese: 小心不要把玻璃打破。

meaning: v. 画， 描绘
example: My little sister likes to draw cats.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹喜欢画猫。

meaning: n. 柜橱
example: The cups are in the kitchen cupboard.
exampleChinese: 杯子在厨房的柜橱里。

meaning: v. 把…藏起来 n. 〔可观察鸟兽行动的〕隐匿处
example: Please hide the gift under the bed.
exampleChinese: 请把礼物藏在床底下。

meaning: v. 签 n. 标志，符号
example: Please sign your name at the bottom.
exampleChinese: 请在底部签上你的名字。

meaning: n. 作家， 作者
example: The author spoke about her new book.
exampleChinese: 这位作者谈到了她的新书。

meaning: n. 米， 公尺
example: The table is about one meter long.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子大约有一米长。

meaning: n. 原形
example: In "to go," go is the infinitive.
exampleChinese: 在 to go 中，go 是原形。

meaning: v. 建立， 设立
example: The school plans to establish a new science club this year.
exampleChinese: 学校计划今年建立一个新的科学俱乐部。

meaning: n. 梦 v. 梦想
example: Her dream is to become a doctor.
exampleChinese: 她的梦想是成为一名医生。

meaning: n. 短文， 文章
example: I finished my history essay last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚写完了历史短文。

meaning: n. 预言
example: His prediction about the weather was correct.
exampleChinese: 他对天气的预言是正确的。

meaning: v. 调查， 检视
example: The students will survey the park this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 学生们今天下午将调查这个公园。

meaning: adj. 紧张的 v. 拉紧 n. 时态
example: I felt tense before the piano competition.
exampleChinese: 钢琴比赛前我感到很紧张。

meaning: n. 烹饪法， 食谱
example: This recipe uses only five simple ingredients.
exampleChinese: 这个食谱只用五种简单的食材。

meaning: v. 封， 密封 n. 封铅，封条
example: Please seal the bag before you put it away.
exampleChinese: 请先把袋子密封好再收起来。

meaning: v. 鞠躬， 低头
example: We bow to thank the audience at the end.
exampleChinese: 结束时我们鞠躬感谢观众。

meaning: v. 打（仗） n. 打斗
example: The two boys started a fight over the ball.
exampleChinese: 那两个男孩因为球打了起来。

meaning: v. 听见
example: Can you hear the birds outside the window?
exampleChinese: 你能听见窗外的鸟叫声吗？

meaning: v. 转动 n. 轮，车轮
example: The front wheel of my bike is loose.
exampleChinese: 我自行车的前轮松了。

meaning: adj. 无家的
example: The city opened a shelter for homeless people.
exampleChinese: 这座城市为无家可归的人开设了一个收容所。

meaning: n. 〈美〉店员
example: The clerk helped me find the right notebook.
exampleChinese: 店员帮我找到了合适的笔记本。

meaning: n. 巴黎
example: My aunt will visit Paris in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈将在春天去巴黎。

meaning: v. 用肘推 n. 肘部
example: He did not mean to elbow me in the crowd.
exampleChinese: 在人群中他不是故意用肘推我的。

meaning: v. 迅速上升 n. 火箭
example: Toy sales often rocket before the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 玩具销量常常在节日前迅速上升。

meaning: n. 一场， 一个镜头， 一节
example: That scene in the movie made everyone laugh.
exampleChinese: 电影里的那个镜头让大家都笑了。

meaning: v. 伤害
example: Be careful not to injure your knee during practice.
exampleChinese: 练习时小心不要伤到你的膝盖。

meaning: v. （使）结冰 n. 〔价格、工资等的〕冻结
example: Cold nights can freeze the water in this bowl.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的夜晚会让这个碗里的水结冰。

meaning: n. 省
example: This province is famous for its tea.
exampleChinese: 这个省以茶闻名。

meaning: n. 书柜
example: The bookcase is full of storybooks.
exampleChinese: 这个书柜里放满了故事书。

meaning: adj. “之”字形的 v. 弯弯曲曲行进 n. “之”字形
example: The path will zigzag up the hill.
exampleChinese: 这条小路会弯弯曲曲地通向山上。

meaning: adv. 在水下 adj. 水下的
example: We saw colorful fish underwater.
exampleChinese: 我们在水下看到了五颜六色的鱼。

meaning: adj. 单数的
example: In English, "cat" is a singular noun.
exampleChinese: 在英语里，cat 是单数名词。

meaning: n. 宿舍
example: She returned to the dormitory after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后她回到了宿舍。

meaning: v. 寻找， 追求
example: Many students seek better ways to study.
exampleChinese: 许多学生寻找更好的学习方法。

meaning: num. 第十八
example: Her birthday is on the eighteenth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月十八日。

meaning: n. 脚后跟， 踵
example: My new shoes hurt my heel.
exampleChinese: 我的新鞋磨脚后跟。

meaning: v. 刺穿， 刺破， 穿透
example: Be careful not to pierce the bag with your pen.
exampleChinese: 小心别用你的笔把袋子刺破了。

meaning: n. 十几岁的青少年
example: The teenager rides his bike to school every day.
exampleChinese: 那个十几岁的少年每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. 日历， 月历
example: I marked the test date on my calendar.
exampleChinese: 我在日历上标出了考试日期。

meaning: n. 车库
example: My father keeps his tools in the garage.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸把工具放在车库里。

meaning: v. 用拖鞋打 n. 拖鞋
example: She bought a new pair of slipper for home.
exampleChinese: 她买了一双新的拖鞋在家里穿。

meaning: n. 地铁
example: We take the subway to the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们乘地铁去博物馆。

meaning: v. 不喜欢
example: I dislike rainy days in summer.
exampleChinese: 我不喜欢夏天的雨天。

meaning: v. 买， 买得
example: I need to buy a notebook after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后我需要买一个笔记本。

meaning: adj. 令人惊异的
example: The view from the mountain is amazing.
exampleChinese: 山上的景色令人惊异。

meaning: num. 第十五 n. 十五分之一
example: Her birthday is on the fifteenth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月十五日。

meaning: adj. 不平常的， 少有的
example: It is unusual to see snow in April here.
exampleChinese: 在这里四月见到雪是不平常的。

meaning: v. 下沉 n. 洗脸盆
example: The boat may sink in the storm.
exampleChinese: 这条船可能会在暴风雨中下沉。

meaning: n. 度， 度数
example: Water freezes at zero degree Celsius.
exampleChinese: 水在零摄氏度结冰。

meaning: n. 洋， 海洋
example: They sailed across the ocean last summer.
exampleChinese: 他们去年夏天航行穿过了海洋。

meaning: v. 解决， 处理
example: We need to solve this math problem first.
exampleChinese: 我们需要先解决这道数学题。

meaning: n. 书桌
example: My books are on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书在书桌上。

meaning: v. 知道， 了解
example: I know his name.
exampleChinese: 我知道他的名字。

meaning: v. 唱， 演唱
example: The children sing after class.
exampleChinese: 孩子们课后唱歌。

meaning: v. 支撑， 扶持， 拥护
example: Strong walls support the roof.
exampleChinese: 坚固的墙支撑着屋顶。

meaning: n. 阳
example: The word Yang appears in his Chinese name.
exampleChinese: Yang”这个字出现在他的中文名字里。

meaning: n. 生命， 性命
example: Clean water is important for life.
exampleChinese: 干净的水对生命很重要。

meaning: n. 可乐饮料
example: He ordered a cola with his lunch.
exampleChinese: 他吃午饭时点了一杯可乐。

meaning: n. 蜜， 蜂蜜
example: She put honey in her tea.
exampleChinese: 她在茶里加了蜂蜜。

meaning: v. 教， 讲授
example: My father can teach me to swim.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸可以教我游泳。

meaning: v. 争论， 争吵， 争辩
example: Don't argue over small things.
exampleChinese: 不要为小事争吵。

meaning: adv. 特意地， 专门地
example: She came early specially to help us.
exampleChinese: 她特意早来帮助我们。

meaning: n. 附件， 零件， 配件
example: This phone accessory is very useful.
exampleChinese: 这个手机配件很有用。

meaning: n. 洗发剂 vt. 用洗发剂洗头
example: I use this shampoo every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天都用这种洗发剂。

meaning: n. 酸奶
example: She eats yogurt for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 她早饭吃酸奶。

meaning: v. 打 n. 类型，种类
example: What type of fruit do you like?
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪种水果？

meaning: v. 来， 来到
example: Please come to my room after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后请来我的房间。

meaning: adj. 惊恐的
example: The little girl felt scared in the dark room.
exampleChinese: 那个小女孩在黑暗的房间里感到惊恐。

meaning: n. 音乐家
example: The musician played the piano beautifully.
exampleChinese: 那位音乐家把钢琴弹得很优美。

meaning: v. 穿着， 戴着， 留
example: I usually wear a hat in summer.
exampleChinese: 我夏天通常戴一顶帽子。

meaning: adv. 在海外 adj. 海外的
example: My aunt works overseas for a year.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈在海外工作一年。

meaning: v. 给…深刻印象
example: Her hard work will impress the teacher.
exampleChinese: 她的努力学习会给老师留下深刻印象。

meaning: n. 特征，特色
example: A large window is a key feature of the house.
exampleChinese: 大窗户是这座房子的一个主要特色。

meaning: v. 获得， 弄到
example: I need to get some milk after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我得去弄点牛奶。

meaning: adj. 规则的
example: The bus comes at regular times every day.
exampleChinese: 这辆公交车每天都按固定时间到。

meaning: v. 卖， 出售
example: They sell fresh fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 他们在市场卖新鲜水果。

meaning: n. 感情
example: Her voice was full of emotion.
exampleChinese: 她的声音充满了感情。

meaning: n. 礼节
example: Good table etiquette is important at formal dinners.
exampleChinese: 在正式晚宴上，良好的餐桌礼节很重要。

meaning: v. 排队 n. 行列
example: We had to queue outside the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们不得不在博物馆外面排队。

meaning: adj. 不礼貌的
example: It is impolite to talk with your mouth full.
exampleChinese: 嘴里塞满食物时说话是不礼貌的。

meaning: v. 揭露， 揭示
example: The test results reveal a clear problem.
exampleChinese: 测试结果揭示了一个明显的问题。

meaning: n. 洋葱
example: She chopped an onion for the soup.
exampleChinese: 她切了一个洋葱做汤。

meaning: adj. 否定的 n. 底片
example: He gave a negative answer to my question.
exampleChinese: 他对我的问题给出了否定的回答。

meaning: adj. 现实的
example: We need a realistic plan for this project.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一个对这个项目来说现实的计划。

meaning: adj. 巨大的 n. 怪物
example: A monster jumped out in the movie.
exampleChinese: 电影里跳出了一个怪物。

meaning: n. 标签 v. 给…加上标签
example: Please tag your bag with your name.
exampleChinese: 请给你的包贴上写有名字的标签。

meaning: v. 〔风〕吹，刮 n. 打击
example: Strong winds blow across the lake in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天强风会吹过湖面。

meaning: n. 地震
example: The earthquake damaged many old houses.
exampleChinese: 这场地震毁坏了许多老房子。

meaning: prep. 向， 朝， 面对
example: She walked towards the school gate.
exampleChinese: 她朝学校大门走去。

meaning: v. 送， 寄
example: I will send the letter tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会寄这封信。

meaning: n. 目的， 意图
example: The purpose of this meeting is clear.
exampleChinese: 这次会议的目的是明确的。

meaning: v. 逃离
example: The villagers had to flee the fire.
exampleChinese: 村民们不得不逃离火灾。

meaning: n. 英雄， 勇士
example: The firefighter was a hero to the children.
exampleChinese: 这位消防员对孩子们来说是一位英雄。

meaning: v. 授予，给予 n. 奖， 奖品
example: She won an award for her painting.
exampleChinese: 她因自己的画作获得了一个奖。

meaning: v. 组织， 安排
example: We need to organize the books on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 我们需要整理书架上的书。

meaning: adj. 令人失望的
example: The test result was disappointing.
exampleChinese: 考试结果令人失望。

meaning: n. 选手， 队员
example: Each player wore a blue shirt.
exampleChinese: 每位队员都穿着蓝色球衣。

meaning: n. 费用 v. 价格为
example: The ticket cost fifty yuan.
exampleChinese: 这张票价格是五十元。

meaning: v. 满足， 满意
example: This meal will satisfy your hunger.
exampleChinese: 这顿饭会满足你的饥饿感。

meaning: modal verb. 将，会，要〔用于构成将来时〕 n. 意志 v. 设法用意志力驱使〔某事发生〕
example: I will finish my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: adv. 真正地， 实际上
example: I really like this science book.
exampleChinese: 我真的很喜欢这本科学书。

meaning: v. 向…挑战 n. 挑战，艰巨任务
example: Climbing the mountain was a real challenge.
exampleChinese: 爬这座山是真正的挑战。

meaning: adj. 野生的， 未驯化的
example: We saw wild ducks by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们在湖边看到了野鸭。
